Advance.name: Advance
Advance.description:
Increases movement speed by 100%, grants immunity to movement-impairing effects, and prevents you from stopping for 5 sec.

After a short delay, you can recast the ability to stomp the ground, dealing 70 Physical damage to nearby enemies. If not recast, you will stomp at the end of the duration.

Assume Peak Posture.name: Assume Peak Posture
Assume Peak Posture.description:
Assumes a position of optimal posture, increasing your epicness by 100% and causing nearby guards to clap for you in envy.

This effect is toggled, moving will end the effect.

Axe Training.name: Axe Training
Axe Training.description: While an axe is equipped, your critical strike chance is increased by 2% and critical damage increased by 5%.

Ballad of the Conqueror.name: Ballad of the Conqueror
Ballad of the Conqueror.description: Play the |cffffffffBallad of the Conqueror|r, instantly dealing 33 Magic damage to an enemy, ignoring resistances.

Ballad of the Dragonslayer.name: Ballad of the Dragonslayer
Ballad of the Dragonslayer.description: Play the |cffffffffBallad of the Dragonslayer|r, instantly dealing 20 Magic damage to all nearby enemies, ignoring resistances, and reducing their attack power by 40 for 10 sec.

Banner Boy.name: Banner Boy
Banner Boy.description: Increases your haste by 5% and the movement speed granted by Line Formation by 8%.

Banner of Conquest.name: Banner of Conquest
Banner of Conquest.description:
Attach a Banner of Conquest to your back, increasing the critical strike chance of party and raid members within 40 yds by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Banner of Swiftness.name: Banner of Swiftness
Banner of Swiftness.description:
Attach a Banner of Swiftness to your back, increasing the haste of party and raid members within 40 yds by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Bannerman.name: Bannerman
Bannerman.description: While affected by your Banner of Swiftness or Banner of Conquest, the initial damage dealt by your Standard of Valiance now deals 150% more damage.

Bard's Manuscript.name: Bard's Manuscript
Bard's Manuscript.description: Reduces the cooldown of Hero's March by -60 sec.

Bastion.name: Bastion
Bastion.description: Raise your shield and lead your allies within 12 yds, reducing their damage taken by -40% for 10 seconds.

Battle Bard.name: Battle Bard
Battle Bard.description: Increases the damage of your Ballads by 15%.

Battle Drums.name: Battle Drums
Battle Drums.description:
Place down 3 Battle Drums around you for 1 minute. 

Allies may click on the drums to increase their critical strike chance, haste, damage, and healing done by 10% and causes their damage dealt to trigger a Sound of War for their next 5 instances of damage or 30 seconds.

Battle Rush.name: Battle Rush
Battle Rush.description: Charge an enemy, dealing 35 Physical damage and stunning them for 1 sec.

Battle Wary.name: Battle Wary
Battle Wary.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Advance and Battle Rush by -30%.

Bloodletter.name: Bloodletter
Bloodletter.description: Avoiding an attack now reduces the remaining cooldown of Glorious Arena by 10%. Can only occur once per sec.

Brace.name: Brace
Brace.description: Fortify your defenses, reducing all damage taken by -50% and gaining immunity to stun effects for 10 seconds.

Bring Down The Hammer!.name: Bring Down The Hammer!
Bring Down The Hammer!.description: Damage dealt by Heavy Blow now deals an additional 20% of the damage dealt every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

Broad Sweep.name: Broad Sweep
Broad Sweep.description: Swing at up to 4 enemies in front of you, dealing 70% Weapon Damage plus 6 and reduces their attack power by 25 for 10 sec.

Built Different.name: Built Different
Built Different.description: Increases your Strength and Stamina by 4%.

Bulwark.name: Bulwark
Bulwark.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your block value by 25% and your hit rating by 5% of your Stamina.

Bulwark Rush.name: Bulwark Rush
Bulwark Rush.description: Casting Battle Rush increases your block rating by 25% of Strength for 6 seconds.

Calculated Strike.name: Calculated Strike
Calculated Strike.description: Your Reprisal, Broad Sweep, and Spear Throw now deal an additional 2% Weapon Damage for each Energy point you have upon casting it.

Call To Arms.name: Call To Arms
Call To Arms.description: Summon a party or raid member to your location.

Cavalry Charge.name: Cavalry Charge
Cavalry Charge.description:
Increases mounted movement speed of all party and raid members within 40 yds by 50% for 10 sec.

Can be used while Mounted. Does not stack with similar effects.

Cavalry Tactics.name: Cavalry Tactics
Cavalry Tactics.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Cavalry Charge by -30 sec and it now prevents root and slow effects on allies.

Centurion Strike.name: Centurion Strike
Centurion Strike.description:
Stab an enemy, dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus an additional effect based on your weapon.

|cFFFFFFFFSword:|r Triggers 3 additional auto attacks.

|cFFFFFFFFAxe:|r Guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage.

|cFFFFFFFFMace:|r Ignores 50% of your target's Armor.

|cFFFFFFFFPolearm:|r Stabs the target and enemies behind them an additional time.

Champion.name: Champion
Champion.description: Your Centurion Strike now extends the duration of Raise Shield on you by 3 sec.

Champion's Presence.name: Champion's Presence
Champion's Presence.description:
Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Chivalry.name: Chivalry
Chivalry.description: Embrace your heroic and brave nature, increasing your Strength by 30% and your critical strike chance and melee haste by 15% for 15 sec.

Clinch Brawler.name: Clinch Brawler
Clinch Brawler.description: Centurion Strike is now guaranteed to critically strike against enemies affected by Net Throw.

Close Combat.name: Close Combat
Close Combat.description: Removes the shared cooldown of your Standards and reduces the cooldown of Guard by -10 sec.

Counter Stance.name: Counter Stance
Counter Stance.description:
You automatically parry the next attack against you. Lasts for 5 attacks or 15 seconds.

When you expend a charge you deal 275 damage to attackers and heal for 366 + 100% AP health.

Crashing Force.name: Crashing Force
Crashing Force.description: Increases the damage of your Centurion Strike and Reprisal by 15%.

Deadly Blow.name: Deadly Blow
Deadly Blow.description: Your Centurion Strike and Broad Sweep now bleed an additional 15% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

Deflector.name: Deflector
Deflector.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Raise Shield by -5 sec and reduces its Energy cost by -10%.

Dissonance.name: Dissonance
Dissonance.description: Damage dealt by Sound of War now has a 25% chance to reduce enemies' resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2% for 8 seconds.

Double Duty.name: Double Duty
Double Duty.description: Increases your hit chance by 5% and expertise by 4.

Earthsplitter.name: Earthsplitter
Earthsplitter.description: Casting Broad Sweep now increases the amount of enemies struck by your next Broad Sweep by 1 and reduces its Energy cost by -10% for 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Echoes of War.name: Echoes of War
Echoes of War.description: Triggering a Sound of War now grants Echoes of War to nearby allies for 8 seconds.Echoes of WarNext direct ability or spell deals 15% of their damage as additional Magic Damage.

Elegant Combat.name: Elegant Combat
Elegant Combat.description: Casting a Ballad has a 20% chance to remove the cost of the next Ram and increase its critical chance by 10%.

Energetic.name: Energetic
Energetic.description: Restores 5 of your Energy every 3 sec.

Experienced Combatant.name: Experienced Combatant
Experienced Combatant.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your attack power by 20% of your Strength.

Experienced Soldier.name: Experienced Soldier
Experienced Soldier.description:
Level 40 Passive
Melee attacks now reduce the cooldown of Brace by -1 sec.

Favor.name: Favor
Favor.description:
Level 50 Passive
Critical strikes and killing blows now grant you Favor for 1 minute, stacking 20 times.

At 20 stacks, your next auto attack deals an additional 500% Weapon Damage, consuming the stacks.

Fearless.name: Fearless
Fearless.description: Each nearby enemy within 10 yds now reduces your damage taken by 1%, up to a maximum of 10%.

Final Verdict.name: Final Verdict
Final Verdict.description:
Give the final verdict to your target, dealing 1195 + 100% AP Physical damage and healing you for 15% of your maximum health.

Only usable on enemies below 20% health. Killing blows reset the cooldown of this ability.

Fire Protection.name: Fire Protection
Fire Protection.description: Increases the target's resistance to Fire spells by 30 for 30 min.

Footman's Call.name: Footman's Call
Footman's Call.description: Damage dealt by Pulverize is increased by 15, plus an additional amount scaling with your block value.

Footman's Calling.name: Footman's Calling
Footman's Calling.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your damage taken is reduced by -10% while Tower Formation or Line Formation is active.

In addition, your threat generated from Physical Damage dealt is increased significantly while Tower Formation or Line Formation is active.

Forceful Impact.name: Forceful Impact
Forceful Impact.description: Casting Raise Shield and Heavy Blow now extends the duration of your Brace by 1 sec.

Frontliner.name: Frontliner
Frontliner.description: Triggering a Sound of War now increases your movement speed by 40% and allies' within 20 yds movement speed by 20% for 2 seconds.

Gallant.name: Gallant
Gallant.description: Increases your Strength by 4% and expertise by 2.

Glorious Arena.name: Glorious Arena
Glorious Arena.description:
Create a 10 yd ring beneath you for 15 seconds. Enemies who stand inside will gain Peril every 1 sec.
 PerilEach stack can be consumed by Pulverize to deal an additional 10% AP Physical Damage and reduce the cooldown of Glorious Arena by 10%.

Upon reaching 5 stacks, the stacks are instantly consumed to stun the enemy for 5 seconds.

Glory.name: Glory
Glory.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your Ram now grants you a stack of Glory for 30 seconds.

At 3 stacks, your next Ram within 30 seconds deals 150% increased damage.

Grand Entrance.name: Grand Entrance
Grand Entrance.description:
Leap into the air, becoming immune to crowd control effects, and then crash back down with incredible speed at your location.

Upon landing, deal 400% Weapon Damage to enemies in the impact area, plus an additional 611 + 77.25% AP over 6 seconds, ignoring Armor and knocking them into the air.

Greater Fire Protection.name: Greater Fire Protection
Greater Fire Protection.description: Increases the target's party and raid members resistance to Fire spells by 60 for 30 min.

Greater Honor.name: Greater Honor
Greater Honor.description: Declare all nearby allies honorable, increasing their Strength by 77 for 30 min.

Guard.name: Guard
Guard.description: Rush towards an ally, intercepting the next melee attack made against them and causing you to critically block the next attack against you. Lasts 5 sec.

Guardbreaker.name: Guardbreaker
Guardbreaker.description: Damage dealt by Pulverize now has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Ram.

Hammer of the Law.name: Hammer of the Law
Hammer of the Law.description: Smash an enemy and enemies behind them in a line, dealing 178 High Threat Physical damage and silencing them for 3.50 sec.

Harrowing Melody.name: Harrowing Melody
Harrowing Melody.description:
Play a harrowing melody, dealing 191 + 42% AP Magic damage and reducing all healing received by enemies within 10 yds by -30% for 10 seconds.

In addition, your next Ballad within 10 seconds is free of cost and deals 50% increased damage.

Heavy Blow.name: Heavy Blow
Heavy Blow.description: Smash an enemy and enemies behind them in a line, dealing 58 High Threat Physical damage, scaling with your defense rating.

Heavy Expert.name: Heavy Expert
Heavy Expert.description: Increases your chance to parry and dodge by 4% and increase your Armor contribution from mail and plate items by 20%.

Hero's March.name: Hero's March
Hero's March.description:
Beat the drums of war, causing your auto attacks to trigger a Sound of War and increasing your haste by 15% for 15 seconds.

In addition, allies within 10 yds of you have a 5% chance to trigger a Sound of War on any damage dealt.

Heroic Deeds.name: Heroic Deeds
Heroic Deeds.description: Increases the reputation gains of your allies within 30 yds by 5% and reduces damage you take by -3%.

Heroic Effort.name: Heroic Effort
Heroic Effort.description: Casting Centurion Strike now grants 1 stack of Glory.

Heroic Resolve.name: Heroic Resolve
Heroic Resolve.description: Steady your resolve, instantly restoring 50 Energy and causing you to critically block the next attack against you. Lasts 5 sec.

Heroism.name: Heroism
Heroism.description: Whenever you reach 3 stacks of Glory or 20 stacks of Favor, your next 2 Pulverizes or Broad Sweeps within 10 seconds are free of cost.

High Guard.name: High Guard
High Guard.description:
Level 50 Passive
After using Raise Shield, Advance or Battle Rush, you are granted High Guard.High Guard (Buff)Your next Heavy Blow within 15 seconds triggers no cooldown.

Hold the Line.name: Hold the Line
Hold the Line.description: Command nearby allies to hold the line, making them immune to incapacitate, disorient, knockback, and grip effects for 15 seconds.

Honor.name: Honor
Honor.description: Declare an ally honorable, increasing their Strength by 4 for 30 min.

Honorable Demeanor.name: Honorable Demeanor
Honorable Demeanor.description: Whenever you block an attack your Strength and Stamina are increased by 2% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Honorbound.name: Honorbound
Honorbound.description: Removes the Energy cost of Shield Challenge.

Inspiring Leader.name: Inspiring Leader
Inspiring Leader.description: You pledge to inspire your allies in the midst of battle, transforming your Pulverize and your Broad Sweep into Ballads.

Inspiring Presence.name: Inspiring Presence
Inspiring Presence.description:
Emanate an aura around you for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 35% AP additional damage as Holy damage when they deal direct damage.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Into The Fray.name: Into The Fray
Into The Fray.description: Triggering a Sound of War now grants you an additional auto attack on your next swing.

Iron Barrier.name: Iron Barrier
Iron Barrier.description:
Level 30 Passive
Your successful blocks now have a 50% chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

Jagged Reinforcement.name: Jagged Reinforcement
Jagged Reinforcement.description: Reinforce your shield with razor edges, increasing your critical damage by 10% and giving your blocks a 30% chance to guarantee your next attack to critically strike. Lasts 1 hr. Can only occur once every 5 sec.

King's Guard.name: King's Guard
King's Guard.description: Your Pulverize and Ram now have a 10% chance to reset the cooldown of Raise Shield.

Knight's Advantage.name: Knight's Advantage
Knight's Advantage.description: Increases your damage dealt against Humanoids by 6%.

Knight's Calling.name: Knight's Calling
Knight's Calling.description: Embrace your calling, restoring 15% of your maximum health and Energy, repeating every 5 sec for 10 seconds.

Knight's Conviction.name: Knight's Conviction
Knight's Conviction.description: Increases the block value provided by Raise Shield by 25% and your block chance by 1%.

Knight's Song.name: Knight's Song
Knight's Song.description:
Casting a Ballad now grants allies Knight's Song.Knight's SongEmanate an aura for 10 seconds that increases the Armor of party and raid members by 400.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Knightly Demeanor.name: Knightly Demeanor
Knightly Demeanor.description: Your attack power is increased by 1 for every 50 Armor you have.

Leading the March.name: Leading the March
Leading the March.description: Increases your attack power and total Armor by 4%.

Legion Commander.name: Legion Commander
Legion Commander.description: The damage increase of Harrowing Melody now affects an additional 2 Ballad casts and guarantees them to critically strike and deal 100% more damage.

Legionnaire.name: Legionnaire
Legionnaire.description: Increases the critical damage of Centurion Strike and Reprisal by 10%.

Liberation.name: Liberation
Liberation.description:
Instantly breaks an ally free of any stun, fear, or polymorph effects and grants immunity to such effects for 5 seconds. 

Dispels 2 harmful magic effects from the ally.

Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

Light Nets.name: Light Nets
Light Nets.description: Increases the range of your Net Throw by 15 yds.

Line Formation.name: Line Formation
Line Formation.description: Increases your movement speed by 15% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects on you by 25%.

Linebreaker.name: Linebreaker
Linebreaker.description: Smash an enemy with great force, destroying any damage absorption or damage immunity effects and reducing their armor by 25% for 5 sec.

Lionheart.name: Lionheart
Lionheart.description: Your Shield of Denial now strikes 1 additional enemy.

Little Drummer.name: Little Drummer
Little Drummer.description: Allies within 20 yds of you now gain 20% chance to resist curses.

Lord of the Arena.name: Lord of the Arena
Lord of the Arena.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Pulverize and Broad Sweep by -5.

Mace Training.name: Mace Training
Mace Training.description: While a mace is equipped, your armor penetration is increased by 8%.

Magic Reinforcement.name: Magic Reinforcement
Magic Reinforcement.description: Reinforce your shield with arcane alloys, reducing your Magic damage taken by 5%, plus an additional 5% from area of effect attacks, and reducing your chance to be hit by spells by 3%. Lasts 1 hr.

Make Room! I'm Here..name: Make Room! I'm Here.
Make Room! I'm Here..description: Increases the duration of Standard of Valiance and Broad Sweep by 50%.

Master of Arms.name: Master of Arms
Master of Arms.description: Your Turn the Blade now guarantees you to parry 1 additional attack and the duration of its parry window is increased by 1 sec.

Minstrel.name: Minstrel
Minstrel.description: Casting a Ballad now increases your haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 8 seconds.

Momentum.name: Momentum
Momentum.description: Melee damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of your Chivlary by -2 sec.

Myrmidon.name: Myrmidon
Myrmidon.description: Removes the Energy cost of Glorious Arena and increases its damage dealt by 25%.

Net Throw.name: Net Throw
Net Throw.description: Toss a weighted net at an enemy that roots them for 4 seconds. While active, the target cannot dodge attacks.

No Escape.name: No Escape
No Escape.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Battle Rush by -10 sec when used against a rooted enemy.

No Retreating!.name: No Retreating!
No Retreating!.description: While in combat, every 2 sec, increase the range and Energy cost of your next Spear Throw by 1 and its damage dealt by 3%, stacking up to 15 times.

One-Handed Mastery.name: One-Handed Mastery
One-Handed Mastery.description: Increases your damage dealt by 10% while a one-handed weapon is equipped.

Order In The Court.name: Order In The Court
Order In The Court.description: Damage dealt by Hammer of the Law now reduces the damage dealt by affected enemies by -10% for 8 seconds.

Overwhelming Presence.name: Overwhelming Presence
Overwhelming Presence.description:
Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your Agility by 10%.

Pied Piper.name: Pied Piper
Pied Piper.description: Triggering a Sound of War now increases damage of your next Ram by 20% for 15 seconds.

Pinned Down!.name: Pinned Down!
Pinned Down!.description: Damage dealt by Spear Throw now refreshes the duration of Net Throw on your target.

Pit Fighter.name: Pit Fighter
Pit Fighter.description: Increases the movement speed slow of your Standard of Valiance by -15%.

Plate Buster.name: Plate Buster
Plate Buster.description: Critical strikes with Ram now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Challenging Cry and Hold the Line by -4 sec.

Poised Reinforcement.name: Poised Reinforcement
Poised Reinforcement.description: Reinforce your shield with magic, causing blocking attacks while below 75% health to grant you 25% increased block value for 5 sec.

Polearm Training.name: Polearm Training
Polearm Training.description:
Allows you to wield polearms and to wield them with a shield equipped.

While a polearm is equipped, your melee abilities have 2 yds increased range.

Powerful Voice.name: Powerful Voice
Powerful Voice.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Ballads by 10%.

Press the Attack.name: Press the Attack
Press the Attack.description:
Raise your shield and press the attack, dealing 75% Weapon Damage plus 83 to enemies in front of you and draining 10 Energy every 1 sec. Lasts 5 seconds.

While active you gain 100% increased block chance and you may block, dodge, and parry while channeling.

Press the Line!.name: Press the Line!
Press the Line!.description: While Line Formation is active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 115%, but its cost is increased by 30 Energy.

Pulverize.name: Pulverize
Pulverize.description: Slam an enemy with your shield, dealing 21 Physical damage.

Raise Shield.name: Raise Shield
Raise Shield.description:
Raise your shield, increasing your block chance and block value by 100% for 4 sec.

While active, blocking an attack restores 20 Energy.

Ram.name: Ram
Ram.description: Ram an enemy with your shield, dealing 24 Physical damage, scaling with your block value, and reduces the target's Armor by -4% for 20 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

Recuperation.name: Recuperation
Recuperation.description: Taking Physical damage or blocking a physical attack now restores 2 Energy.

Reflective Shield.name: Reflective Shield
Reflective Shield.description:
Raise your shield and reflect the next harmful spell cast on you within 3 seconds. 

While active, being hit by a spell restores 20 Energy.

Refuse To Die.name: Refuse To Die
Refuse To Die.description: Casting Advance now resets the cooldown of Raise Shield.

Relentless.name: Relentless
Relentless.description: Your Pulverizes or Rams now ignores -15% of the target's Armor.

Reprisal.name: Reprisal
Reprisal.description:
|cffffffff2 Charges, 6 sec recharge|r
Counterattack an enemy, dealing 105% Weapon Damage plus 12 and restoring 20 Energy.

Only usable after blocking an attack.

Resilient.name: Resilient
Resilient.description: Blocking an attack while Raise Shield is active now increases your maximum health by 308 + 10% Stamina + 11% AP for 15 seconds.

Resolve.name: Resolve
Resolve.description: Increases the duration of your Raise Shield by 1 sec.

Retaliation.name: Retaliation
Retaliation.description: Successful blocks now deal 51 + 5% AP Physical damage to the attacker, scaling with defense rating. Can only occur once per sec.

Reverberations.name: Reverberations
Reverberations.description: Casting Ram now causes your next 3 melee attacks to deal an additional 30 + 10% AP Magic damage for 10 seconds.

Seasoned Fighter.name: Seasoned Fighter
Seasoned Fighter.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Pulverize, Ram, and Broad Sweep by -10%.

Shield Challenge.name: Shield Challenge
Shield Challenge.description: Raise your shield in challenge at your target, taunting them for 3 sec.

Shield Combat.name: Shield Combat
Shield Combat.description:
Level 40 Passive
Casting Ram and Pulverize now increases your attack power based on your block rating for 6 seconds.

Shield Training.name: Shield Training
Shield Training.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your block rating by 10% of your Strength.

Shield Unit.name: Shield Unit
Shield Unit.description: Each time you take damage, you gain 5% of the damage taken as attack power for 1 minute.

Shield Wall.name: Shield Wall
Shield Wall.description: Increases your Armor contribution from your shield by 20%.

Shield of Denial.name: Shield of Denial
Shield of Denial.description: Toss a shield at an enemy that bounces to up 2 nearby enemies, dealing 68 Physical damage and interrupting their spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 3 sec.

Shieldbound.name: Shieldbound
Shieldbound.description: Your Shield Challenge no longer has a cooldown, but now costs 10 additional Energy.

Shieldlord’s Strength.name: Shieldlord’s Strength
Shieldlord’s Strength.description:
You may now use two-handed Maces and can now equip two-handed Maces with a shield.

Your Heavy Blow and Hammer of the Law now deal additional damage scaling with your Stamina and your Stamina is increased by 15%.

Shoulder The Burden.name: Shoulder The Burden
Shoulder The Burden.description: Instantly transfers 50% of the ally target's threat to you.

Show of Force.name: Show of Force
Show of Force.description: Dealing damage with Ram now dispels 1 magic effect from the target.

Shrug It Off.name: Shrug It Off
Shrug It Off.description: Instantly escape the effects of any root or slow and become immune to movement slowing effects for 3 seconds.

Song of Battle.name: Song of Battle
Song of Battle.description:
Every 2 sec you emanate Sounds of War, dealing 71 + 12.74% AP Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Lasts 15 seconds.

Upon expiration, stun all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds.

Song of Steel.name: Song of Steel
Song of Steel.description:
Boost the morale of party and raid members, increasing their attack or spell power by 115 for 15 sec.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Soundwave.name: Soundwave
Soundwave.description: Increases the damage dealt by Sound of War by 15%.

Spear Throw.name: Spear Throw
Spear Throw.description: Throw a massive spear at an enemy, dealing 79 Physical damage, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by 50% for 10 sec.

Spiked Reinforcement.name: Spiked Reinforcement
Spiked Reinforcement.description: Reinforce your shield with spikes, causing your blocks to deal 8 High Threat Physical damage to the attacker. Lasts 1 hour.

Spirit of Battle.name: Spirit of Battle
Spirit of Battle.description:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Stalwart.name: Stalwart
Stalwart.description: Increases your block value by 10% and your expertise by 4.

Stand Your Ground!.name: Stand Your Ground!
Stand Your Ground!.description: While standing in your Standard of Valiance, your allies' Physical damage taken is reduced by -10%.

Standard Bearer.name: Standard Bearer
Standard Bearer.description: Increases the radius of Standards by 10 yds and increases the effectiveness of your Honor by 20%.

Standard of Might.name: Standard of Might
Standard of Might.description:
Throw down a |cffffffffStandard of Might|r for 5 min, increasing the base health of allies within 30 yds by 10% and reducing the duration of disarm effects against them by 30%.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffStandard|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Standard of Rallying.name: Standard of Rallying
Standard of Rallying.description: Throw down a Standard of Rallying for 5 minutes, reducing damage taken by -3% and the duration of stun effects on them by -30% on all allies within 30 yds.

Standard of Recovery.name: Standard of Recovery
Standard of Recovery.description:
Throw down a |cffffffffStandard of Recovery|r for 5 min, healing allies within 30 yds for 7 health every 3 sec, scaling with your Strength, and increasing all healing they receive by 6%.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffStandard|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Standard of Spellwarding.name: Standard of Spellwarding
Standard of Spellwarding.description:
Throw down a |cffffffffStandard of Spellwarding|r for 5 min, reducing the spell haste of enemies within 15 yds by 20%.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffStandard|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Standard of Supremacy.name: Standard of Supremacy
Standard of Supremacy.description:
Throw down a |cffffffffStandard of Supremacy|r for 5 min, causing direct damage dealt by party members within 30 yds to deal an additional 5% of the damage dealt.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffStandard|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Standard of Valiance.name: Standard of Valiance
Standard of Valiance.description:
Throw down a |cffffffffStandard of Valiance|r for 20 sec, nearby enemies within the area take 10 Physical damage every 2 sec and their movement speed is slowed by 40%.

Only 1 |cffffffffStandard|r can be active at a time.

Steel Riposte.name: Steel Riposte
Steel Riposte.description: Reduces the cooldown of Counter Stance and Turn the Blade by -25%.

Strength In Unison.name: Strength In Unison
Strength In Unison.description: Increases your melee haste by 1% for each ally within 20 yds, up to a maximum of 20%.

Supremacy.name: Supremacy
Supremacy.description: Casting Centurion Strike now refreshes a charge of Reprisal.

Sword Training.name: Sword Training
Sword Training.description: While a sword is equipped, your melee haste is increased by 10%.

Tactical Combat.name: Tactical Combat
Tactical Combat.description: Increases your block value by 8% and chance to block by 2%.

The Green Tower.name: The Green Tower
The Green Tower.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Formations and increases their effectiveness by 25%.

Tower Formation.name: Tower Formation
Tower Formation.description: Increases your chance to block by 10% and increases the Armor contribution from your shield by 50%, but your damage dealt is reduced by 10%.

Triumphant.name: Triumphant
Triumphant.description:
Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now restores 20 Energy to you.

Can only occur once every 5 sec.

Turn The Blade.name: Turn The Blade
Turn The Blade.description: Parry the next attack against you within 3 sec. Successfully parrying an attack in this way will disarm the enemy's melee weapons for 6 sec.

Unscuffable.name: Unscuffable
Unscuffable.description: Allies within 30 yds now take -10% less Magic damage from area of effect attacks.

Unstoppable.name: Unstoppable
Unstoppable.description: Reduces the cooldown of Battle Rush by -5 sec and Advance by -30 sec.

Unyielding Stand.name: Unyielding Stand
Unyielding Stand.description: Stand your ground, taunting enemies around you for 5 sec and increasing the damage they take from your |cffffffffSpiked Reinforcement|r by 100%.

Upper Hand.name: Upper Hand
Upper Hand.description: Your melee auto attacks now have a 20% chance to strike 2 additional times.

Valiance.name: Valiance
Valiance.description: Reprisal now regenerates an additional 20 Energy.

Valiant Defender.name: Valiant Defender
Valiant Defender.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 15 and increases the damage of Pulverize and Broad Sweep by 10%.

Valiant Effort.name: Valiant Effort
Valiant Effort.description: Your auto attacks now have a 15% chance to allow the use of Reprisal as if you had recently blocked an attack.

Valiant Knight.name: Valiant Knight
Valiant Knight.description: Melee ability critical strikes now cause your next Pulverize within 6 seconds to be free of cost and deal 25% increased damage.

Valiant Warrior.name: Valiant Warrior
Valiant Warrior.description: Critical strikes with Ram now have a 50% chance to strike again for 100% of the damage dealt.

Valorous Strikes.name: Valorous Strikes
Valorous Strikes.description: Auto attacks now have a 10% chance to strike an additional time and reduce your target's chance to hit by -3% for 15 seconds.

Vanguard's Might.name: Vanguard's Might
Vanguard's Might.description: Your Heavy Blow now causes you to emanate an aura for 5 seconds that reduces all damage taken by -5% for party members.

Vanguard's Shield.name: Vanguard's Shield
Vanguard's Shield.description: Blocking an attack or landing an auto attack now grants a stack of Vanguard for 1 minute, stacking 10 times.Vanguard's ShieldMagic Damage taken reduced by -2%. Whenever you are hit by a spell, you lose 1 stack of this effect.

Veteran of the Third War.name: Veteran of the Third War
Veteran of the Third War.description: You now restore 3% of your base health whenever you block an attack.

Voice of an Angel.name: Voice of an Angel
Voice of an Angel.description: Sing a beautiful song, instantly resetting the cooldown of Liberation, Harrowing Melody, and Hero's March.

War Drums.name: War Drums
War Drums.description:
Adds 5% to the value of Echoes of War.

In addition, performing a Sound of War now has a 40% chance to echo, striking an additional time after 0.5 sec. Can only occur once per sec.

Warbringer's Manuscript.name: Warbringer's Manuscript
Warbringer's Manuscript.description: Critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Hero's March by -1 sec.

Warstopper.name: Warstopper
Warstopper.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Standard of Valiance by -20.

Waste No Movement.name: Waste No Movement
Waste No Movement.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Broad Sweep, Spear Throw, and Centurion Strike by -5.

Weighted Reinforcement.name: Weighted Reinforcement
Weighted Reinforcement.description: Reinforce your shield with heavy alloys, increasing your attack power by 10%, but reducing your attack speed by 10%. Lasts 1 hr.

With Honor.name: With Honor
With Honor.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ram by -4 sec.

Wreck Formation.name: Wreck Formation
Wreck Formation.description:
Melee critical strikes now have a 50% chance to reset the cooldown of Hammer of the Law.

Casting Standard of Valiance now increases your attack power by 10% for 6 seconds.

You Shall Not Fall!.name: You Shall Not Fall!
You Shall Not Fall!.description: While standing in your Standard of Valiance, allies have a -20% increased chance to resist stun and grip effects.
